name: revisorcorrector
description: App Electron para revisar libros de asignatura y guías de formación práctica con rúbrica, PEA y apoyo de IA.
author: Jefferson Villarreal

scripts.check: node -e "require('./src/rc-config'); require('./src/rc-state'); require('./src/rc-document-parser'); require('./src/rc-document-classifier'); require('./src/rc-structure-analyzer'); require('./src/rc-pea-analyzer'); require('./src/rc-rubric-engine'); require('./src/rc-ai-reviewer'); require('./src/rc-report-builder'); require('./src/rc-export-service'); require('./src/rc-file-service'); console.log('Revisorcorrector OK')"
